name: libsnmp-perl
title: libsnmp-perl
summary: SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol) Perl5 support
description:
SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol) Perl5 support
The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) provides a framework
for the exchange of management information between agents (servers)
and clients.
.
The Net-SNMP Perl5 support files provide the Perl functions for
integration of SNMP into applications written in Perl.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsnmp-perl because SNMP (Simple Network Management Protocol) Perl5 support.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsnmp-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsnmp-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsnmp-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
